productDisplayName: Bata Men Tech Brown Formal Shoes
description: Style NoteThe right shoe to beat the corporate mid-week blues from bata. There is a reason the brand is a household name and this shoe shows us why. Easy on the pocket and easy on the eye, we love this chocolate coloured pair! Find a pair your size and buy them now, before we run out of stock...Product DetailsLeather upper with stitch details at the seams of the toe boxPadded inner and tongueClassic four hole lace ups in the oxford styleUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with a raised heel that has grooves all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlight
